What We Do

Complete Outdoor Solutions

We handle every aspect of your outdoor transformation — one team, one call, exceptional results.

🧱

Retaining Walls

Concrete sleeper and timber retaining walls engineered for longevity. We handle excavation, drainage and full installation.

🌿

Lawn Mowing & Care

Professional mowing with commercial-grade equipment. Regular maintenance programs for homes and commercial properties across Melbourne.

🏡

Decks & Pergolas

Custom-built timber and composite decking that adds real value to your property. Designed to last, built to impress.

🚧

Concrete Works

Driveways, paths, patios and slabs. Precision formwork and quality pours — clean finishes every time.

🚪

Gates & Fencing

Automated gates, timber and Colorbond fencing installed to match your home's style and boost security.

🌱

Garden Maintenance

Pruning, mulching, edging, garden bed prep and clean-ups. We keep your garden looking its absolute best year-round.

Decks & Timber Flooring

Stunning Timber Decks,
Built to Last

From rich hardwood verandahs to large-format herringbone patio decks — we design and build custom timber decking that transforms your outdoor living space. Every board is hand-selected, precision-cut and finished to perfection.

Hardwood Verandah
Herringbone Patio Deck
Deck & Retaining Wall Combo
Oiled Hardwood Finish
🌲

Premium Hardwood

Merbau, spotted gum & ironbark sourced from trusted Australian suppliers.

📐

Custom Layouts

Straight, diagonal, herringbone — we build to your vision and space.

🛡️

Treated & Sealed

Professionally oiled and sealed for long-lasting protection against the elements.

✅

Fully Compliant

All decks built to Australian Standards with proper footings and permits where required.

Why Choose Us

Melbourne's Most Trusted Garden Care Team

Based in Boronia, we've been transforming Melbourne outdoor spaces for over 15 years. From a single mow to complete backyard overhauls — we bring the same level of care and professionalism to every job.

  • ✓

    Fully Licensed & Insured

    All work complies with Australian standards. You're covered from start to finish.

  • ✓

    Commercial-Grade Equipment

    We invest in the best tools — from Kobelco excavators to Hustler zero-turn mowers — so every job is done right.

  • ✓

    Knox 3155 & Surrounding Areas

    We service Boronia, Wantirna, Bayswater, Ferntree Gully, Scoresby, Rowville and nearby suburbs.

  • ✓

    Locally Owned & Operated

    Family-run business. We care about our reputation and it shows in every job we complete.
